view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior regarding the 'Time-limited accept/decline window', but the evidence provided does not confirm whether this specific behavior is supported or leads to a clear, actionable failure report. While the linked use case outlines a cascading appointment system, it does not provide concrete evidence of how the time-limited accept/decline window is handled within the system. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
